basics.name: Alex Chen
basics.label: Senior Software Engineer
basics.summary: Senior software engineer with 6+ years of experience across full-stack development, data infrastructure, and platform engineering. Proven track record building high-scale systems at both startups and established companies, with a passion for open-source tooling and mentoring engineers.

work.name: Acme Corp
highlights: Led migration of monolithic API to event-driven microservices architecture, reducing p99 latency by 40% and enabling independent team deployments.
Built real-time data pipeline processing 2M events/day using Kafka and Flink, powering personalization features that increased user engagement by 25%.
Mentored 3 junior engineers through structured pairing sessions, all promoted within 12 months.

work.name: DataFlow Startup
highlights: Designed and shipped the core analytics dashboard used by 500+ enterprise customers, iterating on feedback from weekly customer calls.
Implemented CI/CD pipeline with GitHub Actions reducing deploy time from 45 minutes to 8 minutes with automated rollback on failure.
Built OAuth2/OIDC integration supporting 5 identity providers, enabling enterprise SSO adoption.

projects.name: ML Model Monitor
highlights: Built a real-time model drift detection system with configurable alerting thresholds, deployed on AWS Lambda for zero-ops monitoring.
Designed a React dashboard visualizing prediction distributions, feature importance, and alert history across multiple model versions.

projects.name: DevCLI Toolkit
highlights: Created a Rust-based CLI toolkit with sub-5ms startup time for common developer workflows: git branch cleanup, log tailing, and config management.
Published to crates.io with 2,000+ downloads; maintained backward compatibility across 8 minor releases.

volunteer.summary: Led a team of 8 volunteers building civic tech tools for local nonprofits, delivering 3 projects in 12 months.
